extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install
schema_notes: Each record has row_index, mod_id, display_name, level_requirement, domain, generation_type, generation_type_name, hash, type_key, stats[], active_stat_count.
stats[] is always 4 entries (Stat1-4 slots); is_empty=true for unused slots.
Patch 0.5 added 16 trailing bytes per row (661 -> 677); the documented field layout (0..150) is unchanged.

9 UNKNOWN generation_type values appear (4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 11, 13, 18, 20) - these are pre-existing spec gaps (Bestiary, Essence, Blight, Bloodlines, Talisman, Eclipse Map, Affliction, Torment) inferred from mod_id patterns, not yet enumerated in src/parsers/specifications/mods_spec.py GenerationType.
data_policy: Extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
